info.title: FeatureScript Standard Library - Features-SolidCreation
info.description: Solid body creation — extrude, revolve, loft, sweep, thicken, rib, enclose

symbols.name: enclose
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)

symbols.name: extrude
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description:
Create an extrude, as used in Onshape's extrude feature.
Internally, performs an `opExtrude`, followed by an `opBoolean`, possibly followed by a `opDraft`, possibly in two directions. If creating a simple extrusion, prefer using `opExtrude` alone.

subfields.name: bodyType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies a `SOLID` or `SURFACE` or `THIN` extrude. Default is `SOLID`.

subfields.name: entities
subfields.description:
Required if `bodyType` is `SOLID`The planar faces and/or sketch regions to extrude. 
 Example: 
`qSketchRegion(id + "sketch1") specifies all sketch regions of a given sketch.`

subfields.name: surfaceEntities
subfields.description:
Required if `bodyType` is `SURFACE`The sketch curves to extrude. 
 Example: 
`qCreatedBy(id + "sketch1", EntityType.EDGE)`

subfields.name: endBound
subfields.description: OptionalThe end bounding condition for the extrude. Default is `BLIND`.

subfields.name: oppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to flip the direction of the extrude to point opposite the face/sketch normal.`

subfields.name: depth
subfields.description:
Required if `endBound` is `BLIND`A length specifying the extrude depth. For a blind extrude, specifies the depth of the first extrude direction. For a symmetric extrude, specifies the full extrude depth. 
 Example: 
`0.5 * inch`

subfields.name: endBoundEntityFace
subfields.description: Required if `endBound` is `UP_TO_SURFACE`Specifies the face or surface to bound the extrude.

subfields.name: endBoundEntityBody
subfields.description: Required if `endBound` is `UP_TO_BODY`Specifies the surface or solid body to bound the extrude.

subfields.name: endBoundEntityVertex
subfields.description: Required if `endBound` is `UP_TO_VERTEX`Specifies the vertex to bound the extrude.

subfields.name: hasOffset
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to add a translational offset from the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex.`

subfields.name: offsetDistance
subfields.description:
Required if `offset` is `true`The translational distance between the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex and the cap of the extrude. 
 Example: 
`0.5 * inch`

subfields.name: offsetOppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`false to offset away from the selected end bound (default)` Example: 
`true to offset into the selected end bound`

subfields.name: hasDraft
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to add a draft to the extrude.`

subfields.name: draftAngle
subfields.description:
Required if `hasDraft` is `true`The angle, as measured from the extrude direction, at which to draft. 
 Example: 
`10 * degree`

subfields.name: draftPullDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`false to draft outwards (default)` Example: 
`true to draft inwards`

subfields.name: hasSecondDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to specify a second direction.`

subfields.name: secondDirectionBound
subfields.description: OptionalThe bounding type of the second direction. Can be different from the bounding type of the first direction.

subfields.name: secondDirectionOppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true will flip the second end direction to align opposite the plane/face's normal.`

subfields.name: secondDirectionDepth
subfields.description: Required if `secondDirectionBound` is `BLIND`A length specifying the second direction's extrude depth.

subfields.name: secondDirectionBoundEntityFace
subfields.description: Required if `secondDirectionBound` is `UP_TO_SURFACE`specifies the face or surface to bound the extrude.

subfields.name: secondDirectionBoundEntityBody
subfields.description: Required if `secondDirectionBound` is `UP_TO_BODY`specifies the surface or solid body to bound the extrude.

subfields.name: secondDirectionBoundEntityVertex
subfields.description: Required if `secondDirectionBound` is `UP_TO_VERTEX`specifies the vertex to bound the extrude.

subfields.name: hasSecondDirectionOffset
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to add a translational offset from the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex.`

subfields.name: secondDirectionOffsetDistance
subfields.description:
Required if `offset` is `true`The translational distance between the selected face, surface, solid body or vertex and the cap of the extrude. 
 Example: 
`0.5 * inch`

subfields.name: secondDirectionOffsetOppositeDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`false to offset away from the selected second direction end bound (default)` Example: 
`true to offset into the selected second direction end bound`

subfields.name: hasSecondDirectionDraft
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to add a draft to the second direction extrude.`

subfields.name: secondDirectionDraftPullDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`false to draft the second direction outwards (default)` Example: 
`true to draft the second direction inwards`

subfields.name: operationType
subfields.description: OptionalSpecifies how the newly created body will be merged with existing bodies.

subfields.name: defaultScope
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to merge with all other bodies` Example: 
`false to merge with booleanScope`

subfields.name: booleanScope
subfields.description: Required if `defaultScope` is `false`The specified bodies to merge with.

subfields.name: wallShape
subfields.description: Required if `bodyType` is `THIN`The specified planar face or sketch edges defining the thin wall shape.

subfields.name: thickness1
subfields.description: Required if `bodyType` is `THIN`The outwards thickness of the thin wall.

subfields.name: thickness2
subfields.description: Required if `bodyType` is `THIN`The inwards thickness of the thin wall.

subfields.name: flipWall
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to apply the first offset value instead of the second and vice versa`

symbols.name: LoftEndDerivativeType
symbols.description: Specifies an end condition for one side of a loft.

symbols.name: LoftGuideDerivativeType
symbols.description: Specifies derivative condition for a guide

symbols.name: loft
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)

symbols.name: RevolveBoundingType
symbols.description: Types of bounds allowed in revolve operation.

symbols.name: revolve
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature performing an `opRevolve`, followed by an `opBoolean`. For simple revolves, prefer using `opRevolve` directly.

symbols.name: RibExtrusionDirection
symbols.description: Specifies the direction of the rib extrusion starting from the profile going up to the part.

values.name: PARALLEL_TO_SKETCH_PLANE
values.description: The direction of the rib extrusion goes parallel to the profile sketch plane.

values.name: NORMAL_TO_SKETCH_PLANE
values.description: The direction of the rib extrusion goes normal to the profile sketch plane.

symbols.name: rib
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Creates ribs from selected profiles. The ribs can be either free standing or merged with their mating part. Profiles must be non-construction sketch edges.

subfields.name: profiles
subfields.description: Edges which form the center lines of the ribs.

subfields.name: parts
subfields.description: Parts which form the boundary of the ribs.

subfields.name: thickness
subfields.description: Thickness of the ribs.

subfields.name: ribExtrusionDirection
subfields.description: Whether the rib is extruded perpendicular or parallel to the plane.

subfields.name: oppositeDirection
subfields.description: Whether the ribs are extruded in the positive or negative direction.

subfields.name: hasDraft
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`true to add a draft to the rib.`

subfields.name: draftAngle
subfields.description:
Required if `hasDraft` is `true`The angle of the draft with respect to the extruded direction of the rib. 
 Example: 
`10 * degree`

subfields.name: draftPullDirection
subfields.description:
Optional Example: 
`false to draft outwards (default)` Example: 
`true to draft inwards`

subfields.name: extendProfilesUpToPart
subfields.description: Whether the ribs are extruded up to a boundary part.

subfields.name: mergeRibs
subfields.description: Whether the ribs are merged with the mating part.

symbols.name: sweep
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature performing an `opSweep`, followed by an `opBoolean`. For simple sweeps, prefer using `opSweep` directly.

symbols.name: thicken
symbols.signature: (context is Context, id is Id, definition is map)
symbols.description: Feature performing an `opThicken`, followed by an `opBoolean`. For simple thickens, prefer using `opThicken` directly.
